title: Schitt's Creek
creator: Dan Levy, Eugene Levy
description: A wealthy family loses everything and is forced to live in a small town they once bought as a joke.

title: Murdoch Mysteries
creator: Maureen Jennings
description: A Victorian-era detective uses then-radical forensic techniques to solve crimes in Toronto.

title: Anne with an E
creator: Moira Walley-Beckett
description: A reimagining of 'Anne of Green Gables', following an adventurous orphan in the late 19th century.

title: Orphan Black
creator: Graeme Manson, John Fawcett
description: A woman discovers she is one of many clones and gets pulled into a deadly conspiracy.

title: Kim's Convenience
creator: Ins Choi, Kevin White
description: A Korean-Canadian family runs a convenience store in Toronto's Moss Park neighborhood.

title: Heartland
creator: Lauren Brooke
description: The longest-running Canadian drama, centered on a family living on a horse ranch in Alberta.

title: Trailer Park Boys
creator: Mike Clattenburg
description: Misadventures of three residents of a Sunnyvale Trailer Park in Nova Scotia.

title: Workin' Moms
creator: Catherine Reitman
description: Four friends deal with the struggles of motherhood, careers, and identity in modern-day Toronto.

title: Letterkenny
creator: Jared Keeso
description: Quick-witted residents of a small rural community in Ontario get into various scraps.

title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
creator: Linda Schuyler, Kit Hood
description: The lives of a group of teenagers at Degrassi Community School as they face various challenges.

title: Corner Gas
creator: Brent Butt
description: Life at a gas station in the fictional small town of Dog River, Saskatchewan.

title: Vikings
creator: Michael Hirst
description: The legendary adventures of Ragnar Lothbrok and his family in the Viking Age (Canadian-Irish co-production).

title: Rookie Blue
creator: Morwyn Brebner
description: Follows five ambitious young cops who have just graduated from the academy.

title: Flashpoint
creator: Mark Ellis, Stephanie Morgenstern
description: A high-stakes police drama following the Strategic Response Unit (SRU) in Toronto.

title: Cardinal
creator: Giles Blunt
description: Detectives John Cardinal and Lise Delorme investigate crimes in the fictional city of Algonquin Bay.

title: The Next Step
creator: Frank van Keeken
description: Follows a group of elite dancers at 'The Next Step Dance Studio' as they train for competitions.

title: Continuum
creator: Simon Barry
description: A detective from the year 2077 is accidentally sent back in time to present-day Vancouver.

title: Mary Kills People
creator: Tara Armstrong
description: A doctor moonlights as an underground angel of death, helping terminally ill patients end their lives.

title: Hudson & Rex
creator: Ken Cuperus
description: Detective Charlie Hudson and his German Shepherd partner, Rex, solve crimes in St. John's.

title: Little Mosque on the Prairie
creator: Zarqa Nawaz
description: A small Muslim community in a fictional Saskatchewan town tries to get along with their neighbors.
